sensor: Uncooled microbolometer / VOx (vanadium oxide), 640 x 480, 12 µm pixel pitch, 8-14 µm spectral response

power.method: PoE IEEE 802.3af/802.3at Type 1 Class 3, or 12-26 VDC / 24 VAC auxiliary

features: 194 m person detection range (14 mm / 31° lens)
IVA Pro Perimeter and IVA Pro Buildings deep-learning analytics
12 selectable thermal color modes; 8 privacy masks
Dual microSD slots (mirror / failover / extend), up to 2 TB
Integrated camera heater and window defroster (cold start to -40 °C)
Two-way audio (line in / line out, AAC-LC, full duplex)
TPM, secure boot, signed firmware, TLS 1.2/1.3, 802.1x
Bosch Security Cloud / Remote Portal support
USB-C port for wireless installation dongle

frigate.notes: Bosch official RTSP scheme: /?inst=1 main, /?inst=2 sub (per Bosch 'RTSP usage with Bosch Video IP Devices'). Default admin user is 'service' (no factory default password — set one first). ONVIF Profile S/G (T/M on INTEOX). Not individually bench-tested.

home_assistant.notes: Generic ONVIF integration; Bosch CPP cameras are ONVIF Profile S/G compliant. Use the 'service' account.

blue_iris.notes: Bosch — use the ONVIF/RTSP (or 'Bosch') profile; default admin user is 'service'.
